product_overview: AleX Cinema is an Arabic-first streaming platform that lets users browse, search, and watch movies, series, and anime through a Netflix-like interface. It provides ad-free playback, RTL support, and media access through a proxy-backed catalog sourced from the Cinemana/Shabakaty API.
core_goals: Browse movies, series, and anime by category
Search for titles using text and filters
Open a title and watch streamed video content
Choose playback options such as quality and subtitles
Navigate content comfortably in Arabic on any device

features.name: Featured content discovery
features.description: Users can quickly discover highlighted titles from the homepage carousel and move into a title detail or playback experience.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View featured titles rotating in the hero area -> Open a highlighted title -> See the title details and available playback options

features.name: Category-based browsing
features.description: Users can browse the catalog by genre or category to find movies, series, and anime that match their interests.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a content category -> Browse the matching grid of titles -> Open a title from the results -> See the title details

features.name: Full-text search with filters
features.description: Users can search for specific titles and narrow results using filters such as genre, year, rating, and type.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Enter a title or keyword -> Apply genre, year, rating, or type filters -> View the filtered results -> Open a matching title -> See the title details

features.name: Movies archive browsing
features.description: Users can explore the dedicated movies archive with pagination and sorting to find films more efficiently.
user_flows: Navigate to the movies archive page -> Browse the movie grid -> Move to another page of results -> Change the sort order -> Open a movie -> See the movie details

features.name: Series archive browsing
features.description: Users can explore the dedicated series archive and view recent episodes to keep up with ongoing shows.
user_flows: Navigate to the series archive page -> Browse the series grid -> View the latest episodes listing -> Open a series -> See the series details and episode list

features.name: Video watching and playback controls
features.description: Users can watch a selected movie or episode with controls for stream quality, subtitles, intro skipping, source selection, and viewing mode.
user_flows: Open a movie or series episode -> Start playback -> Select a video quality -> Choose a subtitle track -> Watch the video with playback controls
Open a series episode -> Start playback -> Skip the intro when it appears -> Continue watching the episode -> Move to the next episode
Open a title with multiple sources -> Start playback -> Switch to another source -> Continue watching from the selected source
Open a playing video -> Enable picture-in-picture mode -> Continue watching in a floating player -> Return to the main player

features.name: Series navigation during playback
features.description: Users can move between seasons and episodes directly from the watch experience.
user_flows: Open a series -> Select a season -> Choose an episode from the episode grid -> Start playback -> Move to another episode from the watch page

features.name: Arabic-first responsive experience
features.description: Users can use the app comfortably in Arabic with right-to-left layout across desktop and mobile screens.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the interface in RTL layout -> Browse content in Arabic -> Open a title -> Watch comfortably on the current device
Open the app on a mobile device -> Browse the catalog in the responsive layout -> Search for a title -> Open a result -> Start playback

project.name: AleX Cinema (arabseed-premium)
project.description: Arabic premium streaming platform that proxies content from the Cinemana/Shabakaty Android API. Dual-frontend (Flask + Next.js) with Netflix-like, ad-free UX for browsing, searching, and watching Arabic movies, series, and anime.

features: Hero carousel with auto-rotating featured content
Video grids with poster, rating, year, type badges
Full-text search with advanced filters (genre, year, rating, type)
Dedicated movies archive page with pagination and sorting
Dedicated series archive page with latest episodes view

Full-featured video watch page: Multiple quality streams with resolution selector

features: Proxy API route (/api/proxy) tunneling all media through CGI tunnel
Binary media handling (JSON, images, videos, subtitles)
